framework.name: NIST AI 600-1 Generative AI Profile
framework.disclaimer: NIST AI 600-1 is public domain. Shown for reference — verify against the official NIST publication.

controls.title: CBRN Information
controls.statement: Manage risks that generative AI could lower barriers to access to harmful CBRN-related information.

controls.title: Data Privacy
controls.statement: Manage risks of generative AI leaking or inferring sensitive personal data.

controls.title: Confabulation
controls.statement: Manage risks of generative AI producing confidently stated false content (confabulation/hallucination).

controls.title: Information Security
controls.statement: Manage generative-AI information-security risks including prompt injection and data poisoning.

controls.title: Value Chain and Component Integration
controls.statement: Manage risks arising from third-party models, data, and components in the generative-AI value chain.
